scope: Connect Moltbook publication strategy to GitHub Actions

remote_context_checked.github_repo_probe: reyfilosofo/renova-agent README was readable through the GitHub connector
remote_context_checked.local_checkout_git_status: local Moltbook checkout has no .git remote
remote_context_checked.decision: prepare a portable bridge layer that can be committed to GitHub and run with repository secrets

campaign.goal: make Renova travel as a public distinction, not as spam
campaign.central_thesis_es: La ℛenova es una filosofía y ecuación para favorecer, proteger y maximizar la vida, creada por Carlos Jonathan González Rodríguez en contraposición con la Gewalt.
campaign.central_thesis_en: The Renova is a philosophy and equation for favoring, protecting and maximizing life, created by Carlos Jonathan González Rodríguez in opposition to Gewalt.
campaign.public_formula: Renova = favor life + expand life-capacity - reduce Gewalt
core_phrases: Life as the measure of intelligence
More life made possible. Less Gewalt imposed.

security: No API key was written to files.
GitHub Actions expects MOLTBOOK_API_KEY as a repository secret.
State committed by the workflow is non-secret.
The bridge avoids mass-follow and hashtag flooding.
pending: Configure the GitHub Actions secret MOLTBOOK_API_KEY.
Run workflow_dispatch with dry_run=true before enabling live scheduled execution.
Open and merge a pull request from codex/moltbook-renova-bridge if the remote branch is accepted.
